page.title: Configure AI Communications
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save — please try again
progress.label: SETUP
step1.title: YOUR AI COMMUNICATIONS
step1.description: Your writing profile is ready. The OPS agent can send these emails on your behalf, with as much or as little autonomy as you want. Let's set it up.
step1.estimate: Estimated time: 2 minutes. Every setting is reversible.
step1.types.statusUpdates.title: Status updates
step1.types.statusUpdates.caption: summaries of project progress on a schedule
step1.types.appointmentConfirmations.cap: confirms crew visits with the client
step1.types.appointmentReminders.title: Visit reminders
step1.types.appointmentReminders.caption: reminds clients the day(s) before
step1.types.paymentReminders.title: Payment reminders
step1.types.paymentReminders.caption: follows up on overdue invoices
step1.types.invoiceCover.title: Invoice covers
step1.types.invoiceCover.caption: drafts a cover email with each new invoice
step1.types.rescheduleReplies.title: Reschedule replies
step1.types.rescheduleReplies.caption: responds when clients ask to move dates
step1.types.subcontractor.title: Subcontractor coordination
step1.types.subcontractor.caption: on-demand emails to subtrades
step2.title: STATUS UPDATES
step2.description: Send clients a summary of project progress on a schedule.
step2.previewBody:
Hi Sarah,
Quick update on your deck rebuild. We finished framing this week and lumber for the deck boards is scheduled to arrive Thursday. We're on track to wrap up by the 18th.

Let me know if you have any questions.
step2.cadence.off.title: Off
step2.cadence.off.caption: I'll update clients myself when I want to
step2.cadence.weekly.title: Weekly
step2.cadence.weekly.caption: Every week while projects are active
step2.cadence.biweekly.title: Biweekly
step2.cadence.biweekly.caption: Every other week while projects are active
step2.cadence.monthly.title: Monthly
step2.cadence.monthly.caption: Once a month while projects are active
step2.cadence.on_stage_change.title: Only when project stage changes
step2.cadence.on_stage_change.caption: Fires when a project moves from one stage to the next
step2.autoSendWarning: Status updates will send without your review. You can always cancel within the delay window.
step3.title: APPOINTMENT CONFIRMATIONS
step3.description: When you schedule a crew visit, decide how confirmations should be sent to the client.
step3.level.off.title: Off
step3.level.off.caption: Never send confirmation emails. I'll handle client communication outside OPS.
step3.level.manual.title: Manual only
step3.level.manual.caption: I'll click 'Send Confirmation' when I'm ready. Best if you shuffle schedules frequently while planning.
step3.level.draft_on_confirm.title: Draft on confirm
step3.level.draft_on_confirm.caption: When I mark a task as 'Schedule Confirmed', draft a confirmation email to the approval queue for my review. I approve and send.
step3.level.auto_send_on_confirm.title: Auto-send on confirm
step3.level.auto_send_on_confirm.caption: When I mark a task as 'Schedule Confirmed', draft and auto-send the email after a short delay. I can cancel if I need to.
step3.level.full_auto.title: Full auto
step3.level.full_auto.caption: Draft and auto-send the moment a task gets a scheduled date. No manual confirmation step. Best for high-volume consistent work.
step3.subQ.sendDelayLabel: How long can you cancel the draft?
step3.subQ.rescheduleBehavior: WHEN I RESCHEDULE AN ALREADY-CONFIRMED TASK
step3.confirmMode.explicit.title: Explicit
step3.confirmMode.explicit.caption: I'll click a 'Confirm Schedule' button on each task when I'm ready.
step3.confirmMode.automatic.title: Automatic
step3.confirmMode.automatic.caption: Tasks auto-confirm after being stable (unchanged) for the grace period.
step3.reschedule.do_nothing.title: Do nothing
step3.reschedule.do_nothing.caption: I'll handle it myself.
step3.reschedule.notify.title: Notify me in-app
step3.reschedule.notify.caption: Flag the change so I remember to call or email the client.
step3.reschedule.draft.title: Draft a schedule-changed email
step3.reschedule.draft.caption: Draft an update and send it to my approval queue for review.
step3.reschedule.auto_send.title: Auto-send a schedule-changed email
step3.reschedule.auto_send.caption: Draft and auto-send the update after the configured delay.
step3.fullAuto.warning: This sends emails automatically without your review. You can always cancel within the delay window. We recommend trying DRAFT ON CONFIRM first for a few weeks.
step3.fullAuto.lockedReason: Unlocks at writing confidence ≥ 85% and 50+ prior confirmations sent. You're at {{confidence}}% and {{priors}} priors.
step3.previewBody:
Hi Sarah,
Just confirming we have the deck rebuild booked for Thursday, April 18th at 8:00 AM. Our crew (Mike and Luis) will be on site at 142 Birchwood Lane for approximately 2 days.

Please make sure we have clear access to the backyard. Thanks!
step4.title: VISIT REMINDERS
step4.description: Remind clients before their scheduled visit.
step4.previewBody:
Hi Sarah,
Quick reminder that our crew will be on site tomorrow, Thursday April 18th, around 8 AM for your deck rebuild. Looks like clear weather — we'll be there first thing.

Please make sure the gate is unlocked. See you tomorrow!
step5.title: PAYMENT REMINDERS
step5.description: Follow up on overdue invoices automatically.
step5.preset.standard.title: Standard
step5.preset.standard.caption: 7 / 14 / 30 / 45 days after due date
step5.preset.gentle.title: Gentle
step5.preset.gentle.caption: 14 / 30 / 45 / 60 days after due date
step5.preset.aggressive.title: Aggressive
step5.preset.aggressive.caption: 3 / 7 / 14 / 30 days after due date
step5.preset.custom.title: Custom
step5.preset.custom.caption: Define your own four-step schedule
step5.autoSendWarning: Final notice emails are serious — review them before the collections-tone reminder goes out.
step6.title: INVOICE COVER EMAILS
step6.description: When you create an invoice, the agent can draft a cover email to the client.
step6.enable: Draft cover emails on new invoices
step6.thresholdHint: Only draft cover emails for invoices at or above this amount. Set to 0 to always draft.
step6.autoSendWarning: Financial documents are high-stakes. We strongly recommend keeping invoice cover emails in the approval queue.
step7.title: RESCHEDULE REQUESTS
step7.description: When a client emails asking to reschedule, the agent can detect it, find alternatives, and draft a response.
step7.behavior.detect_only.title: Detect and notify only
step7.behavior.detect_only.caption: Agent flags the request, you handle the response.
step7.behavior.detect_and_draft.title: Detect and draft response
step7.behavior.detect_and_draft.caption: Agent proposes alternatives and drafts an acknowledgment reply.
step7.confidenceHint: Higher = fewer false positives but might miss edge cases.
step7.warning: AI detection isn't perfect. The agent proposes responses through the approval queue — you always review before sending (unless auto-send is enabled).
step8.title: SUBCONTRACTOR COORDINATION
step8.description: Draft coordination emails to subcontractors with project details, schedules, and access info.
step8.trigger.manual.title: Manual trigger only
step8.trigger.manual.caption: I'll click 'Coordinate with sub' in the project view when I need one.
step8.trigger.auto_suggest.title: Auto-suggest on stage change
step8.trigger.auto_suggest.caption: When a project moves to a stage that typically needs a subtrade, propose one automatically.
step9.title: EMAIL CATEGORIES
step9.description: You can set different trust levels per relationship type. These override the choices above for specific email categories.
step9.noConnection: Connect an email account first to configure per-category autonomy.
step10.title: YOU'RE SET
step10.description: Review your communications configuration. You can change any setting anytime from Settings → Communications.
step10.reminder: The agent will remind you occasionally to review your settings as your business grows.
autonomyPicker.label: AUTONOMY
autonomyPicker.off.title: Off
autonomyPicker.off.caption: Don't propose emails for this type.
autonomyPicker.draft_to_queue.title: Draft to approval queue
autonomyPicker.draft_to_queue.caption: Draft the email and let me review before sending.
autonomyPicker.auto_send.title: Auto-send after delay
autonomyPicker.auto_send.caption: Draft and auto-send after a cancellable delay.
confirmButton.captionTentative: mark this task as ready for client confirmation
confirmButton.confirmedWithAction: Schedule confirmed — draft is in the approval queue
